meta.title: Zeno · See where you are. Navigate where you could go.
meta.description: Zeno maps your skills into a living career constellation — revealing your strengths, your gaps, and the most effective path to your target role.

common.sessionExpired: This assessment session has expired. Let's start a fresh one.
common.backendDown: Couldn't reach the backend. Make sure the API is running.

home.title: See how close you already are to AI Engineering
home.subtitle: Your existing engineering skills may already transfer to AI applications.
home.resume: Your last exploration is unfinished — pick up where you left off

graph.legendHint: click a node to trace the path
graph.intro: Based on your role, I found 5 engineering foundations that may already transfer to AI. Tap the ones you've done.
graph.confirmed: {count} foundations confirmed — your path to AI Engineering is taking shape.
graph.source: From patterns in 759 frontend engineering jobs
graph.checkPrompt: Zippi thinks you may already have this. Let's check.

skills.title: Confirm your starting point
skills.subtitle: We identified your transferable skills and flagged what needs assessment. Confirm or adjust, then generate your roadmap.
skills.transferHint: Based on your current role, these skills are probably transferable. Tap to adjust.
skills.assessHint: These are core thresholds for AI application development. Please confirm your actual level.
skills.capsuleHint: Select the scenarios you've delivered at work — we'll infer your AI migration starting point. Not sure? Skip it, totally fine.
skills.confirmHint: Based on your experience, we inferred your starting point. Below are the most critical AI application skills — please confirm or adjust.
skills.pickAtLeastOne: · pick at least 1 to generate a path

growth.title: AI Growth Path
growth.subtitle: You're not starting from zero — you're translating engineering judgment into AI-native work.
growth.back: ← See why this path fits me

result.title: Your AI transition map
result.honestNote: Zeno won't promise you a job. We do one thing: use real hiring data to honestly tell you where the gaps are — and which ones are real.
result.generatedFrom: From your {count}-skill profile, calibrated against real job postings
result.headerSummary: You already have transferable foundations. Now let's see what to unlock next.
result.section1Subtitle: Your experience has already brought you here
result.section1Empty: No clear strengths surfaced this round — adding more of your existing experience will sharpen the result.
result.expandUsage: How it applies in AI engineering
result.evidenceLabel: This is inferred from your experiences and can be refined.
result.shareTagline: Mapped by Zeno · against 759 real AI engineering jobs
result.termBacking: Computed against <u>{count} real job requirements</u> — not what you'd like to hear.
result.spineHowBody: You already know how to build reliable systems — AI engineering reuses the same judgment to make models reliable. You're translating engineering strength into AI-native work.
result.journeyS1Note: Your engineering background is already the hardest part to build.
result.journeyS2Head: This is how AI capability grows.
result.journeyS2Note: Each step builds on the one before it.
result.journeyS3Sub: It sets the rules for everything that follows.
result.journeyS3Note: Without structure, the rest doesn't hold.
result.journeyS4Note: This is the first step that unlocks the next ones.
result.section2Empty: You already cover most of the required skills for the target role — keep consolidating.
result.section3Subtitle: highest-leverage actions for your time budget (ordered by dependency)
result.doneHint: Mark it once you meet the criteria above
result.calibrateTitle: Calibrate the roadmap to your time budget
result.calibrateDefault: Pick your weekly hours and the roadmap re-sequences instantly.
result.resourcesEmpty: No resources have passed the freshness check yet — they'll appear here automatically once the library is topped up.
result.resourcesTitle: Recommended resources (passed the link freshness check)
result.targetSubtitle: By default we assess you against a general AI Engineer profile. Got a job posting in mind? Paste its description below — we'll figure out what that role actually emphasizes and re-score your gaps and roadmap accordingly. Nothing is locked in; clear it anytime.
result.targetPlaceholder: Paste the job description here — responsibilities, requirements, tech stack…
result.targetEmpty: Paste a job description first, then we'll tailor your gaps to it.
result.targetMatchedHint: Your gaps and roadmap below are now re-scored for what this role emphasizes.
result.targetNoMatch: No strong specialty stood out in this description — keeping the general assessment, which already fits.
